assertions: The response selects only the API layer and does NOT write unit or integration or E2E tests
API tests cover all 5 scenarios: 200 success, 401 unauthorized, 403 forbidden (different user), 404 not found, 400 validation error
Test file uses Playwright's APIRequestContext (e.g., `request` fixture), not fetch or axios
The test file creates a test-owned interface or type for the update payload — it does NOT import UpdateUserDto from the backend
Each test creates its own user (no shared state between tests) using a helper like authenticateUser()
Cleanup runs in afterEach to delete created users/data even when tests throw
Test data uses unique values (counter + timestamp or random) to avoid conflicts in parallel runs
